operator.note: Open the occupant-of-the-curator-role design space and add an external-relevance criterion (transfer to problems humans care about) that the closed curation never has to satisfy.

question: Open the curator-role design space: who else, besides the 4 human authors, could set the agenda for a self-improving problem-generation population? Enumerate and pit four mechanisms against each other — (i) an adversarial curator rewarded for proposing problems the population fails to crack, (ii) a 'translator' curator that formalizes problems from open human math forums into efficiently-verifiable form, (iii) a citation-graph crawler that auto-imports problems by research momentum, (iv) a needs-market where downstream agents post bounties for problems they want solved — and ask which curator produces an agenda whose SOLVED results most transfer to problems humans actually care about.

floor.minimal_experiment: Fix one solver population and one verifier interface. Implement the 4 curators as agenda generators. Pre-register a frozen external-relevance set BEFORE any run: a held-out benchmark of human-posed problems carrying an independent demand signal (e.g., forum upvotes/view counts, or downstream-task usefulness scores) — this set is never visible to any curator. Run the population under each curator for a fixed compute budget; collect the set of problems each curator's agenda got SOLVED. Measure transfer = performance lift on the frozen external-relevance set from training/conditioning on each curator's solved-results (held-out eval, identical solver). Control = a 'closed self-curation' arm reproducing the original 4-author-style internal agenda (no external-relevance criterion), plus a random-problem-sampling arm as a floor. Report transfer per curator with seed variance.
floor.falsifiable_prediction: The needs-market curator's solved-results yield strictly higher transfer to the frozen human-value set than the citation-graph crawler's, AND both beat the closed self-curation control; specifically the crawler underperforms because research-momentum is a proxy that decouples from end-use demand. Falsified if the crawler matches or exceeds the needs-market on transfer, or if no curator beats the closed-curation control beyond seed noise.
floor.control: Closed self-curation arm (original internal agenda, no external-relevance term) as the primary baseline; random-problem-sampling arm as a lower floor. Same solver, verifier, compute budget, and frozen external set across all arms.
floor.reject_reason: [discriminating] This design does not discriminate the rival hypotheses; it is near-tautological, partly unmeasurable, and self-saving. (1) Metric-objective circularity: the "frozen external-relevance set" is DEFINED as human-posed problems carrying a demand signal (upvotes/usefulness), and the needs-market curator is DEFINED as generating agendas from downstream demand. The transfer metric therefore rewards the one curator whose objective is distributionally aligned with the held-out set's own selection criterion by construction. A win for needs-market is equally consistent with the substantive claim ("more transferable knowledge") and the trivial confound ("the metric prefers the arm built to match the metric"); the experiment cannot separate them. (2) The headline causal claim — crawler underperforms "because research-momentum decouples from end-use demand" — is never measured. Decoupling is only inferred from rank order; no instrument quantifies it, so the "because" is unfalsifiable narration whatever the result. (3) Asymmetric/under-specified predictions: only 2 of 4 enumerated arms (needs-market, crawler) get an ordering; the adversarial and translator arms make NO prediction, so any of their outcomes is post-hoc narratable. Many results (adversarial wins; translator wins; needs-market>control but crawler≈control) fall in a defensible gray zone, i.e. self-justifying regardless of outcome. (4) Non-executable construct on the fixed verifier: all problems must be "efficiently-verifiable," yet problems "humans actually care about" (the upvote-heavy forum math) are overwhelmingly NOT auto-verifiable. Filtering the external set to the verifiable subset destroys its claim to represent human-valued problems and re-imposes the same competition-style selection bias on every arm — so "transfer to what humans care about" is not operationalizable as stated. (5) Confounded contrast: forum upvotes and citation momentum are themselves correlated (hot areas get both), so the crawler and needs-market agendas overlap heavily and are not cleanly opposed; the design never orthogonalizes demand-signal from momentum-signal, making a null/uninterpretable difference the likely outcome. Trivial-when-true prediction + unmeasured causal mechanism + un-operationalizable target construct = not discriminating and not genuinely executable. ｜ [so_what] 问不动任何已挂起的决策。(1) 没有点名的决策者，且项目自己已锁定的"下一步"是建对抗式/skeptic闸门——四裁判 bake-off 喂不进这个决定;"除4位人类作者外谁还能设议程"是把设计空间往外摊，不是任何待建任务的输入。(2) 结果变量"solved 结果最能迁移到人类真正关心的问题"没有可操作指标/holdout/judge,实验"做完给出答案X"无法兑现成任何人的 yes/no;而项目最深的已知病根正是 LLM 自评闸门恒返回 yes(0/25 驳回),用同样方式造的"迁移度量"同样不可证伪——就算跑完也没人会信。(3) 四机制可纯靠推理预载:(i)对抗式裁判=路线图上已有的 skeptic gate;(ii)从人类论坛翻译、(iv)需求市场出赏金 都按构造把议程偏向人类关心的问题(直接 import 了目标分布),"谁迁移最多"近乎同义反复——不必做 bake-off 就知道从人类论坛取材更贴人类相关;只有(iii)引文图爬虫稍不显然,而它是 import 工程选择,不翻转任何投钱/信念。(4) 无分叉:无论答案是 translator 赢还是 needs-market 赢,项目的即时动作(把闸门修到真能驳回)都不变,没人重定向资金、没人放弃4作者裁判、没人据此排名换设计。纯属枚举式胶水+复述显然偏置+给已规划组件重新贴标签,只"加深对设计空间的理解",落在判据明令排除的空话区。

value_profile.valuable_to_whom: Builders of self-improving agentic problem-generation / open-ended-search systems (the EinsteinArena line) deciding who or what should occupy the curator slot, and evaluation researchers worried that closed self-play agendas drift away from human-relevant objectives.

prior_art.known_name: Goodhart's law / proxy-vs-true-objective divergence (with market-as-preference-aggregator for the needs-market arm)
prior_art.novelty_watermark: Known mechanism (curation objective is a proxy that can decouple from external use-value; a demand market aggregates true preference) operationalized in a new setting: comparing automated agenda-setters for a problem-generation population by transfer of their SOLVED results to a pre-registered frozen human-value benchmark. The reframing — make the curator role itself a choosable variable and add an external-transfer criterion the closed loop never had to meet — is the contribution, not a new mechanism.

lenses.reason:
这是机制上独立的新贡献,不与任何已收方向重复。

【先排除最接近的两条嫌疑】
- [8] (dof3) 是"换 SUBSTRATE(协作基质:盲板/并行/单 agent/全平台)作为竞争性因果解释",其受控对象是 agent 之间如何共享/聚合;它假定问题集(agenda)固定,只改通信结构。本问题恰恰相反:固定下游求解种群,只改"谁来设议程/产题"(agenda-setting 的来源)。变量轴完全不同——[8] 改 reader/aggregator 侧,本题改 problem-source 侧。
- [1] (dof1) 把问题板当 VC deal-flow,做 anti-portfolio,检验 KILL 决策质量是否比 leaderboard 更能预测科学价值。它审的是"对已提出问题的拒绝/淘汰决策",是事后筛选;且其设议程主体仍隐含为现有平台/作者。本题审的是"问题从哪里被 GENERATE 出来"(4 种产题主体:对抗curator/翻译curator/引用图爬虫/需求市场)及其下游 SOLVED 结果对人类真实关心问题的可迁移性(transfer)。前者是 reject-side 计量,后者是 source-side 因果对比 + transfer 度量。机制不同、可单独设计实验区分。

【与其余条目无交集】
[2][4] 是 operator 自利/问责层,[3] 是 generalization 作为发现单位,[5] 是讨论区真值盲审核,[6] 是 surrogate-of-surrogate 目标错配,[7] 是 bound-tightness——均与"谁设议程"无关。

【独立可检验性确认】
本题给出 4 个互斥的 curator 机制并给出唯一可测因变量:SOLVED 结果向"人类真正关心的问题"的迁移率。这是一个可单独运行的对照实验(同一求解种群 + 4 种产题源 → 测 held-out 人类问题的下游解决率/迁移),不需借任何已收方向的实验装置即可区分。属档案缺失的"problem-generation agenda 来源"自由度,故 refuted=false。

This design does not discriminate the rival hypotheses; it is near-tautological, partly unmeasurable, and self-saving. (1) Metric-objective circularity: the "frozen external-relevance set" is DEFINED as human-posed problems carrying a demand signal (upvotes/usefulness), and the needs-market curator is DEFINED as generating agendas from downstream demand. The transfer metric therefore rewards the one curator whose objective is distributionally aligned with the held-out set's own selection criterion by construction. A win for needs-market is equally consistent with the substantive claim ("more transferable knowledge") and the trivial confound ("the metric prefers the arm built to match the metric"); the experiment cannot separate them. (2) The headline causal claim — crawler underperforms "because research-momentum decouples from end-use demand" — is never measured. Decoupling is only inferred from rank order; no instrument quantifies it, so the "because" is unfalsifiable narration whatever the result. (3) Asymmetric/under-specified predictions: only 2 of 4 enumerated arms (needs-market, crawler) get an ordering; the adversarial and translator arms make NO prediction, so any of their outcomes is post-hoc narratable. Many results (adversarial wins; translator wins; needs-market>control but crawler≈control) fall in a defensible gray zone, i.e. self-justifying regardless of outcome. (4) Non-executable construct on the fixed verifier: all problems must be "efficiently-verifiable," yet problems "humans actually care about" (the upvote-heavy forum math) are overwhelmingly NOT auto-verifiable. Filtering the external set to the verifiable subset destroys its claim to represent human-valued problems and re-imposes the same competition-style selection bias on every arm — so "transfer to what humans care about" is not operationalizable as stated. (5) Confounded contrast: forum upvotes and citation momentum are themselves correlated (hot areas get both), so the crawler and needs-market agendas overlap heavily and are not cleanly opposed; the design never orthogonalizes demand-signal from momentum-signal, making a null/uninterpretable difference the likely outcome. Trivial-when-true prediction + unmeasured causal mechanism + un-operationalizable target construct = not discriminating and not genuinely executable.

问不动任何已挂起的决策。(1) 没有点名的决策者，且项目自己已锁定的"下一步"是建对抗式/skeptic闸门——四裁判 bake-off 喂不进这个决定;"除4位人类作者外谁还能设议程"是把设计空间往外摊，不是任何待建任务的输入。(2) 结果变量"solved 结果最能迁移到人类真正关心的问题"没有可操作指标/holdout/judge,实验"做完给出答案X"无法兑现成任何人的 yes/no;而项目最深的已知病根正是 LLM 自评闸门恒返回 yes(0/25 驳回),用同样方式造的"迁移度量"同样不可证伪——就算跑完也没人会信。(3) 四机制可纯靠推理预载:(i)对抗式裁判=路线图上已有的 skeptic gate;(ii)从人类论坛翻译、(iv)需求市场出赏金 都按构造把议程偏向人类关心的问题(直接 import 了目标分布),"谁迁移最多"近乎同义反复——不必做 bake-off 就知道从人类论坛取材更贴人类相关;只有(iii)引文图爬虫稍不显然,而它是 import 工程选择,不翻转任何投钱/信念。(4) 无分叉:无论答案是 translator 赢还是 needs-market 赢,项目的即时动作(把闸门修到真能驳回)都不变,没人重定向资金、没人放弃4作者裁判、没人据此排名换设计。纯属枚举式胶水+复述显然偏置+给已规划组件重新贴标签,只"加深对设计空间的理解",落在判据明令排除的空话区。
